text: Space and time aren't separate; they’re one fabric, curved by mass-energy. This concept, called spacetime, is pivotal in understanding relativity. Imagine a trampoline, where the surface bends under a heavy ball. That's spacetime reacting to mass. Researchers have shown that light bends around massive objects, confirming this interaction. Understanding spacetime reveals how gravity works, altering our perception of the universe. Curious about more science mysteries? Hit that follow button!
